notes: Parliament of Canada legislation. LEGISinfo provides status and text of federal bills.

data.description: Proposed Canadian federal AI regulation. Part of Bill C-27 (Digital Charter Implementation Act, 2022).
data.notes: Part of Bill C-27 (Digital Charter Implementation Act). Proposes regulation of AI systems in Canada. Includes high-impact AI system requirements: risk assessments, mitigation measures, transparency, record-keeping. Establishes the AI and Data Commissioner. Bill C-27 died on the order paper when Parliament was dissolved in January 2025. May be reintroduced in a future session.
